differential_diagnoses: Acromegaly (pseudo-acromegalic features secondary to severe insulin resistance)
next_steps: Test for anti-insulin receptor antibodies to rule out Type B insulin resistance syndrome
Measure serum IGF-1 level to evaluate for acromegaly
Assess thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4)
Review history for signs of systemic inflammatory disease or panniculitis that may have preceded fat loss
Consult with endocrinology for specialized management of ultra-high dose insulin regimens and consideration of adjuvant therapies like metreleptin if indicated
